senses.gloss: The seventh letter of the Arabic alphabet, called خَاء (ḵāʔ) and written in the Arabic script; preceded by ح (ḥ) and followed by د (d).
The twenty-fourth numeral symbol of the Arabic alphabet (traditional abjad order, used for list numbering), written in the Arabic script; preceded by ث (ṯ) and followed by ذ (ḏ).

etymology.text: Derived from ح (ḥ), and originally written as such (in rasm) by analogy with Nabatean tradition, as Nabatean cognates of Arabic words with /x/ were indiscriminately spelled using 𐢊 (ḥ).
